harker.name: Jonathan Harker
harker.description: A young English solicitor, earnest and methodical, sent to the Carpathians on the Count's business — and slowly engulfed by horror.

dracula.name: Count Dracula
dracula.description: An ancient Transylvanian nobleman — tall, gaunt, pale and predatory; the vampire of the Carpathians.

scenes.title: The Last Approach
scenes.mood: A desperate ride through the snow as the light fails and the Szgany guard the great box
